sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-08-26 18:37
- Distance: 12.3 km
- Moving time: 1:10:59
- Elapsed time: 1:13:06
- Elevation gain: 187 m
- Average heart rate: 157.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 173 bpm
- Average watts: 217 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `6` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `155.8 bpm`, ranging from `135.2` to `166.2 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `148.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `163.0 bpm` (+14.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.4 spm`, with a working range of `123.3` to `170.4 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `158.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `166.4 spm` (+8.1 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:47 /km` across `12.271 km` in `1:10:59` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:35 /km` and second-half pace was `5:59 /km` (+24 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `157.7 bpm` average and `173 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `151.5 bpm` in the first half and `163.0 bpm` in the second (+11.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:10:59` out of `1:13:06` elapsed (97.1%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `0.8%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `210.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.2 m` and `69.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `68.8 m` in the first half and `141.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
